scopeDefinitions.personal: Owner preference or learning style that applies to the owner only.
scopeDefinitions.project: Project-specific operating lesson tied to a named AG OS project.
scopeDefinitions.client: Client-specific operating lesson that must not be generalized without owner approval.
scopeDefinitions.company: AG Digitalz-wide operating lesson or rule.
scopeDefinitions.agent_shared: Reusable lesson available to approved AG OS workers.
scopeDefinitions.worker_specific: Guidance for one worker type or tool path only.

notes: Unified Memory + Learning OS v1 registry. This is governance metadata only; it does not promote candidates, create accepted lessons, or grant live-action permission.
